resultList.dtldesc: Experience a superior lifestyle in this meticulously designed 3 BHK apartment located in Casagrand Utopia, Manapakkam, Chennai. This premium residential project is a kids-themed gated community, making it a perfect sanctuary for families. The development is thoughtfully planned as a vehicle-free zone on the ground floor to ensure maximum safety for children. Offering a perfect blend of luxury and quintessential comfort, this property provides a world-class living experience in one of Chennai’s most flourishing residential neighbourhoods. Its strategic location and modern architecture make it an exceptional choice for those seeking a prestigious and secure home.::::Property Specifications::The residence boasts a sprawling super area of 1864 sq. ft and is situated on the ground floor of a four-storey building. This north-facing apartment is a new construction in pristine, ready-to-move condition. The layout includes three spacious bedrooms, three well-appointed bathrooms, and a private balcony that overlooks a beautifully maintained garden or park. Offered as an unfurnished unit, it allows you the creative freedom to design your dream interiors from scratch. The property is held under freehold ownership, ensuring a secure investment and complete peace of mind for the homeowner.::::Facilities::Casagrand Utopia offers an extensive array of world-class facilities designed to cater to all age groups. Residents can enjoy unique amenities such as a kids' play pool with water slides, an arts and craft studio, and a dedicated amphitheatre for community events. For fitness enthusiasts, the project features a jogging and strolling track, while the clubhouse serves as a vibrant social hub. The gated community ensures safety with 24-hour security and features like power backup and reserved parking. The project’s emphasis on open spaces and safety-focused design provides a serene environment for a balanced lifestyle.::::Locality::Manapakkam is a sought-after locality in West Chennai, known for its excellent connectivity and proximity to major IT and ITES hubs. The property is conveniently located near the Madeshwaran Temple and is just a short distance from the DLF Cyber City and L&T Infotech, making it ideal for professionals. For families, five international schools are situated in the immediate vicinity, including the Lalaji Memorial Omega International School. Healthcare needs are well-catered for with MIOT International Hospital located nearby. The area is well-serviced by public transport and features various retail outlets and banks, ensuring that all essential services are within easy reach.
